articles.description: Rarible has announced the integration of Tezos NFTs into its platform, expanding its offerings and allowing users to buy, sell, and create non-fungible tokens (NFTs) on the Tezos blockchain. This move aims to enhance user experience and leverage Tezos' energy-efficient technology, tapping into a broader market for digital art and collectibles.
